meaning: n.深坑,深渊,陷阱,(物体或人体表面上的)凹陷,(英国剧场的)正厅后排、正厅后排的观众vt.窖藏,使凹下,去...之核,使留疤痕,使竞争vi.起凹点,凹陷
examples: Eric lost his footing and began to slide into the pit.
We dug a deep pit in the yard.
For those who want a mosh-pit-like experience, there is plenty of room to dance.
Mr Sim said Hobs Pit provided more thrills than the Nemesis Sub-Terra ride, which "wasn't scary at all".
